---
title: "Data Modelling"
format: html
---

# Exploring the snow survey data

```{r}
# load in libraries
library(tidyverse)

# read in data
snow_survey_data <- read_csv("hw1", "data", "ASDN_Snow_survey.csv")
observer_data <- read_csv("hw1", "data", "personnel.csv")
site_data <- read_csv("hw1", "data", "site.csv")
species_data <- read_csv("hw1", "data", "species.csv")
```
